compressed_prompt: Write a letter to a friend in all lowercase letters ask them to go and vote.
response:
hey,

hope you're doing okay. just a quick thought i wanted to share. you know how we always talk about things we wish were different? well, i was thinking that our chance to actually have a say in that is coming up soon.

so, this is my friendly nudge: please go vote. it really does matter. it’s one of those small things that adds up to something big. your voice, your choice—it all counts.

no need for a big production. just swing by whenever you can. i’m planning to go on tuesday morning, if you want some company.

let’s grab a coffee after? we can debrief.

take care,

[your name]
